claims.comparison_population: postictal (within 20 min of seizure) vs baseline/interictal
claims.supporting_quote: Serum levels of prolactin may increase as a consequence of epileptic seizures... a rise is seen in approximately 60% of complex partial seizures. Prolactin usually fails to rise after psychogenic seizures, therefore, postictal prolactin levels can be used to differentiate between epileptic and psychogenic seizures.
